title: leonia borealis
intro: Leonia borealis, also known as the golden ragwort, is a type of flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leonia borealis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Leonia borealis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
